join_order.notes: Drive fact access from filtered sub.adsh keys; for each adsh posting rowid, apply USD bitset + value-not-null and aggregate

data_structures.fact_join: pre_built_index(num_adsh_fk_hash) with USD membership bitset from num_uom_hash
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local direct_array(filtered_sub_cardinality) then compact_hash_map rollup for (name,cik) and cik

indexes.purpose: prune sub blocks and materialize fy=2022 adsh keys
fetch only fact rowids for fy=2022 adsh keys instead of full num scan
build USD rowid bitset once and apply as cheap membership test during adsh posting probes
dense adsh domain bound and validation for adsh-keyed filters

optimization_notes: Root cause is plan/implementation mismatch: Iter 0 still pays full-table fact scan and per-row hash aggregation despite available posting indexes, so main_scan dominates. Strategy Category A/C: reorder to filter sub(fy=2022) first and drive fact access through num_adsh_fk_hash postings, apply USD via a compact rowid bitset built from num_uom_hash, and replace per-row hash updates with thread-local direct arrays over filtered sub keys before a small final rollup; this removes unnecessary row touches and hot-path hash work while preserving query semantics.
